subcodes.first_line: O thou candle of the love of God. Thy letter was received. Its contents emanated from a spiritual heart and indicated advancement towards the Kingdom of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع محبت الله نامه رسید مضمون منبعث از قلب نورانی بود و دلیل توجه بملکوت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
